title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 64.473 - Revocation of license, notice and hearing
text:
64.473.  Revocation of license, notice and hearing. — The county commission may revoke any license after reasonable notice and hearing if it finds that the disposal area is not operated in a sanitary manner as required in sections 64.460 to 64.487.
(L. 1955 p. 348 § 5)
